name: com.williamschack.repetitionless
description: Repetitionless is a set of shaders that removes texture repetition using various toggleable techniques with additional support for unity terrains, supporting BIRP, URP, and HDRP

samples.description:
The core assets used for the samples.
Must be installed alongside the chosen render pipeline

Contains 3 seperate example scenes showcasing the materials.
For the Built-In Render pipeline

Contains 3 seperate example scenes showcasing the materials.
For URP

Contains 3 seperate example scenes showcasing the materials.
For HDRP
